title: Transparent
description: Transparent Frosted Style for Main Menu UI
body:
![Transparent Frosted Background for Main Menu UI](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/943ede1c036f3845868f5ea42f418641d4685fca_0.webp) 
![Menu background is fully Clear](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/06fe3c22268576754318e2e0950369860d9cf085.png)!
![Color the outline](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/937c17be377a0e461c49bfee5964034289826229.png)![Color the outline](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/64e75fbadca320b4090b1ee395bedb02e83f5c57.png)![Color the outline](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6bcb387cb15d4c8637578e2de9878cbc3f8a4952.png)
![Color the outline](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ce3012b2b13441b38d01f7ee2c70bb7d540ef76e.png)
This is a GUI resource pack that adds a transparent frosted style to the main menu buttons--Higher version, better effect!!!

Issues & requests welcome, thanks！--https://discord.gg/GJVhPD5NCU

Continuous improvement!--Next: Add common in-game GUI
  

Thanks for your love, keep happy!🥰🥰🥰
